Events

Catch the latest happenings at Robinsons Malls

SHOW ALL
This Father’s Day, Robinsons Malls brings families together through Dad’s Day, Your Favorite Way, a curated lineup of activities, dining perks, and special treats designed to make every moment with Dad even more memorable.
Robinsons Malls have secured three major wins at the Retail Asia Awards 2026.
Celebrate Dad’s Day, Your Favorite Way at Robinsons Malls with fun activities, special promos, and exclusive offers made just for him.
Robinsons Malls continues to champion wellness, recreation, and meaningful community experiences, its expanding network of active third spaces reflect a growing shift toward a more balanced and healthier lifestyle.
Robinsons Malls and RLove reaffirm their commitment to building better lives — one community, one opportunity, and one meaningful experience at a time.
This Mother’s Day, go beyond the usual and celebrate the extraordinary women who do it all.
The country’s biggest Free Comic Book Day celebration returns this summer to Robinsons Galleria
Hundreds of job seekers connect with recruiters at Robinsons Malls’ Job Fair, exploring diverse career opportunities across industries.
KKV is now open at Robinsons Galleria!
Celebrate Mother's Day at Robinsons Malls! 💖
More reasons to love weekends at Robinsons Galleria!
Celebrate Independence Day at Robinsons Malls with meaningful moments that celebrate Filipino pride, talent, and opportunity!
Read the full mechanics to learn how to join.
Make your dining more rewarding only at Robinsons Galleria.
Good news! Your favorite promo is making a comeback at Galleria Ortigas. 🎊
Grab your wish-list finds or treat yourself to something new this End of Season Sale! 🛍️✨
South Korean fashion brand 8Seconds is now open at Robinsons Manila with exciting opening promos.
Dinosaurs Alive is now open at Robinsons Galleria—see life-size, roaring dinos in an epic exhibit!
Enjoy FREE parking with a ₱1,200 Shakey’s dine-in or carry-out purchase at select Robinsons Malls.
Get a FREE Christmas Gift Wrapper for every ₱500 single-receipt purchase at Robinsons Malls! 🎁
